description: Golden fixture set for Clip Atlas video analysis. Each clip is generated from an AI image prompt and rendered as a continuous DJI/gimbal-style single-take MP4, then compared with the indexed analysis output.

clips.source_prompt: A realistic DJI drone-style travel clip source frame representing a high-angle scenic view of lush green mountain peaks with a misty valley below under soft morning light. Stable aerial drone travel-footage look, wide 16:9 frame, no text, no logos, no watermark.

A realistic gimbal-style travel clip source frame representing cozy restaurant dining: close-up on a steaming hot bowl of ramen noodles on a wooden counter, warm lighting, chopsticks resting on the bowl, kitchen background in soft focus. Stable gimbal travel-footage look, wide 16:9 frame, no text, no logos, no watermark.

A realistic vertical gimbal-style travel clip source frame representing a walk down a narrow city alleyway at dusk: glowing signs, hanging paper lanterns, wet pavement reflections, storefront windows, and people walking in the distance. Stable vertical travel-footage look, vertical 9:16 frame, no readable signs or text, no logos, no watermark.

A realistic DJI-style travel clip source frame representing a modern indoor subway platform: clean concrete floor, yellow safety line, tracks, glass safety doors, and a train approaching in the distance under bright fluorescent lights. Stable travel-footage look, wide 16:9 frame, no readable text or signage, no logos, no watermark.

A realistic gimbal-style travel clip source frame representing a modern hotel room interior: wide view of a tidy double bed with white linens, a large window letting in natural afternoon light, view of distant city skyline through the window. Stable panning travel-footage look, wide 16:9 frame, no text, no logos, no watermark.
